stimulus: Hyperloop systems propose to move passenger pods at near-supersonic speeds through low-pressure tubes, drastically cutting intercity travel times. Although hyperloop advocates in the US have spent more than a decade promising that the technology would soon crisscross the country, no commercial passenger system has opened. ______blank the only operational hyperloop-style passenger tests so far have been short demonstration runs, none longer than 500 meters.
stem: Which choice completes the text with the most logical transition?
rationale:
Choice D is the best answer. The previous sentence states that no commercial hyperloop passenger system has opened. The new sentence intensifies this by adding an even more striking fact (only sub-500-meter test runs have occurred). “In fact” is the right transition for emphasizing and reinforcing the prior point.

Choice A is a cause-and-effect transition; nothing here is being caused. Choices B and C signal contrast, but the new sentence agrees with and intensifies the previous one.
